build.stdout:
rm -rf	*.o *.out \
	./kernel/*.o \
	./util/file/*.o \
	./util/num/*.o \
	./output.txt

g++   -Wall -fopenmp -O3 ./main.c \
	-c \
	-o ./main.o \
	-O3
g++   -Wall -fopenmp -O3	./kernel/kernel_wrapper.c \
	-c \
	-o ./kernel/kernel_wrapper.o 
g++	./util/file/file.c \
	-c \
	-o ./util/file/file.o \
	-O3
g++	./util/num/num.c \
	-c \
	-o ./util/num/num.o \
	-O3
g++   -Wall -fopenmp -O3 ./main.o \
	./kernel/kernel_wrapper.o \
	./util/file/file.o \
	./util/num/num.o \
	-lm \
	-o myocyte.out

verification.details: exit_code=0 == expected 0. Exit code 0 indicates successful solver convergence
